notes: Panel aligned with Worker 3.8.1. Adds a Worker version + update indicator on the Worker-requests card — it shows your running version and whether you're on the latest, with a one-click route to the Update panel when a newer version exists. The TLS toggle (Settings -> Security) is now wired to generate non-TLS configs when turned off. Carries everything from 3.8.0: one-click in-app updates, live Worker usage via a single Cloudflare token, connection-aware Update panel, and full Farsi/English localization.
